title: Notifications to be sent at TIME given in relevant field
excerpt: I am trying to use Monday as a daily task took among other things, and need to have reminders sent at the right TIME. Currently there is no way to send reminders at a specific time for each pulse based on a specific date…

posts.author: mitchmann (Mitch Sayers)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am trying to use Monday as a daily task took among other things, and need to have reminders sent at the right TIME. Currently there is no way to send reminders at a specific time for each pulse based on a specific date column (with time selected). If no time is selected, then the board automation default time would be used.

Screenshot_20671369×778 70.4 KB
Screenshot_20681099×535 45.3 KB

posts.author: mitchmann (Mitch Sayers)
posts.cookedHtml:
mitchmann:

Monday as a daily task took

… Monday as a daily task tool …

posts.author: lauralev (Laura Levy)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @mitchmann! Are you sending reminders through automations? If so, any recipe that includes “when” will allow you to choose a time. Is that helpful? Cheers!

posts.author: mitchmann (Mitch Sayers)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Laura, no I am wanting to send reminders at a specific time PER pulse using a Date/ time column. Then I’d set up a automation to send the reminder at that date/ time.

posts.author: mitchmann (Mitch Sayers)
posts.cookedHtml: This is actually a critical feature for me. I need timed reminders for tasks quite urgently. Is this a feature currently in the development plan?

posts.author: lauralev (Laura Levy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Mitch!

I appreciate your feedback on this one, I realize this would be a great addition to the notification automations. We are aware that time is not taken into account when the date arrives, our team is looking into how to prioritize this but have not yet put this on the roadmap. Stay tuned for more developments though at monday.com/roadmap! Cheers!

posts.author: ebrad (Ethan Bradford)
posts.cookedHtml:
Laura,
When will the feature to trigger notifications at a specific time be avialable?

posts.author: Banji (Banji oladimeji)
posts.cookedHtml: This feature is very important to us. I need to cancel my subscription and look for something that has specific time reminder.

posts.author: mitchmann (Mitch Sayers)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Laura,

Hard to imagine that almost a year has passed … and that there seems to be no movement on this item, as far as I can tell. Can you please give an indication of where this is on the roadmap? Any other suggestions for workarounds??

posts.author: AngeF (Angela)
posts.cookedHtml:
I agree, this is such a critical element of reminders. We need the granularity of setting reminders against time. For example, we need to be alerted 15 minutes before a time arrives for essential price changes to be made.

Has there been any progress on this on the dev roadmap?

posts.author: DBCC (DBCC dev)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Monday team (@lauralev) , this is a critical feature that we depend on, any updates on it?

posts.author: shaunmb98 (Shaun Brown)
posts.cookedHtml:
Just wanting bring this thread back to the top of the list as it is an important feature!

Thanks

posts.author: fede (fede)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, this is a very important feature missing, for example if i want monday to notify me one houre before a meeting or send a client a remoinder 2 hours before the meeting is not possible.
can you add this functionality please?
thanks

posts.author: Mack (Mack C)
posts.cookedHtml: Please add this feature.

posts.author: tsprks (todd)
posts.cookedHtml: This is a critical feature for me, without this I can’t use Monday.com for task management at all. I’m not sure how it’s been years and this feature hasn’t been added.

posts.author: Jean (D)
posts.cookedHtml:
Please …
thank you
Jean

posts.author: jasonblairlewis (Jason Lewis)
posts.cookedHtml: same, we need this feature. How can you not be notified at a specific time.

posts.author: lead (Utku)
posts.cookedHtml:
hello monday devs & @lauralev

I think a notification automation feature for a specific date & time in the “date” column is an essential feature for a lot of people. There is a notification automation option for a date on monday now, but it does not include the TIME. Please

posts.author: arichey (Alysha Richey)
posts.cookedHtml: Has this had any traction on a solution yet? I have another clients looking for this functionality as a make or break for using Monday.com

posts.author: Dylan (Dylan Hayes)
posts.cookedHtml: Any progress on this?

posts.author: Dylan (Dylan Hayes)
posts.cookedHtml:
How on earth does a feature this essential for basic project management not been addressed after a full 2.5 years? The TIME data is preserved in the date field, so why can’t the automations read it? What could possibly be the roadblock here?

This can’t be the reason we have to switch to Asana + Zap. This is too simple to fix. Makes my head hurt that it’s being openly ignored by development for this long. What a disaster for such a simple feature. Everybody hits the celling somewhere, sure, but this is pretty low to the ground. How on Earth did I grow out of Monday in like 5 months. How does that even happen?

Simple things like this are burning customer turnover way too hot. I’m sure the dev team is desperately scrambling to prevent management from seeing this, but hey who needs the revenue anyway right?

posts.author: Dylan (Dylan Hayes)
posts.cookedHtml: Custom formulas being difficult to implement: that I understand. This however, is just normal laziness.

posts.author: coreye (Corey Engstrom)
posts.cookedHtml: When will this feature be implemented??? Our company just adopted Monday.com but we are considering changing to a different platform as this feature is critical to the success of our team.

posts.author: ngerard (Nicolas)
posts.cookedHtml:
4 years and this basic feature is still not implemented… so disappointing
@lauralev please?

posts.author: Dana (Dana Halperin Hoffen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Now you can, with the Time Based Automations & Reminders app!

With this app you can set up automations and reminders based on the specific time of any item in your board!

We’re constantly striving to improve and learn, so I’d really appreciate your feedback after using the app and any suggestions on how we can make the user experience even better!

posts.author: shayroberts (Shay Roberts)
posts.cookedHtml: Seriously, $35 a month for time-based reminders on five boards???

posts.author: Dana (Dana Halperin Hoffen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Dear @shayroberts, thank you for your feedback!
As a company that is always working to improve our service, our pricing model is also something that we’re happy to hear feedback about!
In how many boards would you like to use this app? What would make a reasonable price for you?
Thank you!

posts.author: shayroberts (Shay Roberts)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, @Dana , I found another product that does most of what I need for free. Perhaps consider offering a stripped down version of your product for solo entrepreneurs and small businesses. Thanks.

posts.author: josuexvolt (Josh Cruz)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @shayroberts, would you mind sharing the name of the product?

posts.author: shayroberts (Shay Roberts)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @josuexvolt , I am using Snooze: https://snooze.atomicapps.io/

posts.author: Aidan1 (Aidan)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @shayroberts , Aidan from Atomic Apps here. I’m so glad you’re finding our snooze app useful! What else do you need the app to do? Curious if we can extend the functionality to serve you better. Thanks!

posts.author: workflowboost (Bartosz @ Workflow Boost)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

You can set it up using Advanced Time Triggers app. It introduces the automation to send notification at a date and TIME specified in the date column:

image2198×1250 272 KB

Additionally, app shares a custom trigger block to build ANY automation using monday or third party actions:

image1154×924 74.6 KB

Keep in mind that there can be up to 15 min delay (actions are scheduled every 15 minutes).

If you have any questions, feel free to reach out to us!

posts.author: timsahlberg (Tim)
posts.cookedHtml:
lauralev:

Is that helpful? Cheers!

I also need this. I am super surpriced it’s not even there yet. Seems like a must have feature.

posts.author: reinier (Reinier ― 📅 Calendar Plus 🍅 Automato)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’d like to provide Automato as an alternative app here. It can trigger an automation on the minute (give or take a few seconds) and can also trigger some time ahead of the date/time to provide eg. reminders.

10 minutes before Meeting start arrives Then notify Person(2)754×219 14.5 KB

  • No accuracy limitation: automations trigger on the minute.
  • Any number of boards.
  • Free 50 triggers every month.

–
